channel.title: Maurice Moret's Blog — Mortek
channel.description: Articles on personal development, productivity, and creative living by Maurice Moret.

item.title: Why You Can't Stop Overthinking (And How to Finally Break Free)
item.description: Learn why your brain gets stuck in overthinking loops and discover practical, science-backed techniques to break the cycle and reclaim mental clarity.

item.title: How Stoic Philosophy Can Save Your Sanity in the Modern World
item.description: Discover how Stoic philosophy from Marcus Aurelius, Epictetus, and Seneca can help you manage anxiety, cut through distraction, and find calm in the chaos of modern life.

item.title: Your Brain on Dopamine: How Technology Rewires Your Motivation
item.description: Understand how modern technology hijacks your dopamine system, why you feel unmotivated and scattered, and how to reset your brain through intentional low-stimulation periods.

item.title: Why Motivation Fails and What to Build Instead
item.description: Learn why motivation always fades and how to build lasting discipline through habit systems, environment design, and the compound power of small daily actions.

item.title: Why Financial Freedom Doesn't Require Anyone's Permission
item.description: Financial freedom doesn't require a six-figure salary, a trust fund, or anyone's approval. Learn the mindset shifts and practical first steps that let ordinary people build real wealth.

item.title: The Hidden Language of Human Behavior: How to Read People
item.description: Learn to decode microexpressions, body language clusters, and the gap between what people say and what they mean. Practical techniques for reading human behavior in everyday life.

item.title: Why True Health Is More Than Physical Fitness
item.description: True health is more than gym sessions and clean eating. Discover the six dimensions of wellness and why neglecting any one of them undermines all the others.
